examples: Their trade laws are fiendishly complex.
This figure is reached by a fiendishly clever equation.
As a ballerina, to embody the duality of the Swan Queen and the black swan can be a fiendishly difficult task.
Economics makes that a very simple proposition, just as politics makes it fiendishly difficult.
The partnership information (Form K-1) which tends to run twenty pages or more is fiendishly complex.
